General.Name: Zhaobangji Properties Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Seven Elements Investment Holdings Limited , an investment holding company, engages in the trade and lease of machinery and spare parts in Hong Kong and the People's Republic of China. It operates through five segments: Trading; Leasing; Property Management; Property Leasing, Subletting, Retail and Others; and Money Lending. The company sells machinery and spare parts, as well as provides related services. It also engages in the provision of transportation, property management, property leasing, subletting, retail management, and other services; and money lending business. The company was formerly known as Zhaobangji Lifestyle Holdings Limited and changed its name to Seven Elements Investment Holdings Limited in November 2025. The company was incorporated in 2016 and is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong. Zhaobangji Lifestyle Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Boardwin Resources Limited.
General.Address: China Merchants Tower, Central, Hong Kong
